mapper.insert: INSERT INTO survey_templates ( survey_template_id, company_id, name, stage, manager_only, status, target_role, purpose, created_by, created_at, updated_at, version, is_default, description ) VALUES ( #{surveyTemplateId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{managerOnly,jdbcType=BIT}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetRole,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{purpose,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{isDefault,jdbcType=BIT}, #{description,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE survey_templates SET company_id = #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, stage = #{stage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, manager_only = #{managerOnly,jdbcType=BIT}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_by = #{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_at = #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, is_default = #{isDefault,jdbcType=BIT}, description = #{description,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, target_role = #{targetRole,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, purpose = #{purpose,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE survey_template_id = #{surveyTemplateId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT survey_template_id, company_id, name, stage, manager_only, target_role, coalesce(purpose, 'ONBOARDING_FEEDBACK') as purpose, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at, version, is_default, description FROM survey_templates WHERE survey_template_id = #{surveyTemplateId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT survey_template_id, company_id, name, stage, manager_only, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at, version, is_default, description, target_role, coalesce(purpose, 'ONBOARDING_FEEDBACK') as purpose FROM survey_templates

SELECT survey_template_id, company_id, name, stage, manager_only, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at, description, version, is_default, target_role, coalesce(purpose, 'ONBOARDING_FEEDBACK') as purpose FROM survey_templates WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND stage = #{stage} AND target_role = #{targetRole} AND coalesce(purpose, 'ONBOARDING_FEEDBACK') = 'ONBOARDING_FEEDBACK' AND is_default = true AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND survey_template_id <> #{excludeTemplateId} LIMIT 1

SELECT survey_template_id, company_id, name, stage, manager_only, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at, description, version, is_default, target_role, coalesce(purpose, 'ONBOARDING_FEEDBACK') as purpose FROM survey_templates WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND stage = #{stage} AND target_role = #{targetRole} AND coalesce(purpose, 'ONBOARDING_FEEDBACK') = 'ONBOARDING_FEEDBACK' AND is_default = true AND status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1
